_comment: The REAL game's main characters. Not exploring skeletons anymore — the human skeleton is fixed. Exactly two characters: default_boy and default_girl, each generated as a persistent 8-direction static PixelLab character (create-character-with-8-directions). No animations, no outfits — just the awesome 8-direction base model. If a character folder is deleted, the loop regenerates it as a fresh, slightly different variation (a new seed), so you can reroll until happy.
_style_base: Empty on purpose — the character prompts below are self-contained (they carry their own style direction). Do NOT append a 'Grave Seasons / Stardew Valley' style here: it pushed the heroes toward generic farmers.

budget._comment: Low floor — this is only two cheap characters; it can run on the last of the shared pool / usd credits.

characters.default_boy: A young male adventurer at the beginning of his heroic journey, confident and naturally charismatic, with a slightly rebellious edge. He has sharp expressive eyes, tousled dark brown hair, and a lean athletic build. His stance should feel relaxed but ready, as if he has courage and hidden potential even though he is not yet an experienced hero. He wears a practical fantasy adventurer outfit: a fitted dark teal tunic, a short weathered leather jacket or shoulder guard, a utility belt, dark fitted trousers, fingerless gloves, and sturdy travel boots. Add a small sword or dagger at his side, but avoid heavy armor, royal clothing, farming clothes, overdecorated fantasy gear, or a generic medieval peasant appearance. The character should look cool, memorable, capable, and slightly mysterious — someone destined to become a legendary hero, but still early in his story. Attractive without looking overly perfect, youthful without looking childish, heroic without looking like an established knight. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, detailed but controlled pixel work, cohesive fantasy color palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
characters.default_girl: A young female adventurer at the beginning of her heroic journey, confident, fearless, and naturally charismatic, with a cool slightly rebellious presence. She has sharp expressive eyes, windswept dark auburn hair, and a lean athletic build. Her stance should feel relaxed but ready, showing courage, independence, and hidden heroic potential without making her look like an experienced warrior yet. She wears a practical fantasy adventurer outfit: a fitted deep blue-green tunic, a cropped weathered leather jacket or asymmetrical shoulder guard, a utility belt, dark fitted trousers, fingerless gloves, and sturdy travel boots. Add a small sword or dagger at her side, but avoid dresses, excessive armor, royal clothing, farming clothes, overly cute details, sexualized clothing, or a generic medieval peasant appearance. The character should look cool, memorable, capable, and slightly mysterious — someone destined to become a legendary hero, but still early in her story. Beautiful without looking like a princess, youthful without looking childish, heroic without looking like an established knight. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, detailed but controlled pixel work, cohesive fantasy color palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
